js_fields.label: Ish tajribasi haqida ma'lumot
js_fields.description: Ishtirokchi barqaror rivojlanish bo‘yicha hisobotlarni yoki Global Reporting Initiative (GRI) standartlari va/yoki boshqa qo‘llaniladigan xalqaro moliyaviy bo‘lmagan hisobot standartlariga muvofiq tayyorlash va tasdiqlash bo‘yicha tajribaga ega bo‘lishi shart.

js_fields.label: Mutaxassislar haqida ma'lumot
js_fields.description: Loyiha menejeri CFA ESG Investing sertifikatiga ega bo‘lishi lozim. SASB standartlari bo‘yicha mutaxassis IFRS Foundation tomonidan berilgan IFRS Fundamentals of Sustainability Accounting credential hamda ACCA sertifikatiga ega bo‘lishi lozim.
